name: dhh-css
description: Write a real CSS design system the 37signals way — in any framework, with zero build tools. 5 skills distilled from 37signals' Campfire, Writebook, and Fizzy (~14K lines of CSS, no Sass, no PostCSS, no Tailwind). Teaches any LLM to bootstrap a design system from a blank project, then keep it consistent: cascade layers, OKLCH design tokens, dark mode by flipping values, semantic component classes driven by CSS variables, modern features (:has(), @starting-style, container queries, color-mix, native nesting), plus guardrails (anti-patterns, naming, a review checklist). Framework-agnostic: drop the CSS into React, Vue, Svelte, plain HTML, or anything that loads a stylesheet.
